tick_delta_vs_1300.summary: No state change in the 30-minute window. Strategy layer silent (no new BUY/SELL/MODIFY since BANDHANBNK BUY at 12:44:19, 46 min ago). The two OPEN orders from earlier (GLENMARK 09:10, BANDHANBNK 12:44) remain pending. Cash, holdings, sector mix, deployment, and P&L are all identical to the 13:00 snapshot.

findings: Zero-delta tick: no fills, no new submissions, no SELLs in the 13:00→13:30 window. Book is in steady state.
Cash buffer healthy at 50.55% of capital (₹503,275). Filled deployment 49.45% / full-fill projection 59.30% — comfortable 5.70 pp buffer to 65% cap.
No single-name concentration breach: largest filled position NESTLEIND at 12.06% of capital, 2.94 pp buffer to 15% max_position_pct cap.
No sector concentration breach: largest sector BFSI 12.93% on full fill (PNBHOUSING+BANDHANBNK), 9.07 pp buffer to 22% max_sector_pct cap. All 6 sectors comfortably under cap.
Daily realized P&L = ₹0 (2 BUYs today, both still OPEN; 0 SELLs). No risk of daily_loss_limit_pct circuit breaker firing.

GLENMARK OPEN order is now 4h19m old — flagged for ageing observability. Submitted 09:10:58 at ₹2400 limit; if the limit is meaningfully off-market, the order may simply not fill today. Not a risk-monitor lever (cancellation is a strategy-layer call), but worth noting in case it remains stale into EOD.

Per-name worst-case risk ~0.22% of capital each (5% size × 4.4-4.5% SL), within 0.5% per-name budget. Cumulative book P&L -0.44% (₹-4,407.36) reflects Day-6 panic-exit damage. Book is healing via cash redeployment, not realization.
actions_considered_but_not_taken: Tighten daily_loss_limit_pct (0.04 → 0.03): NOT FIRED. Book at 0.0 daily P&L, ~₹40K buffer to circuit breaker.

Tighten max_deployed_pct (0.65 → 0.60): NOT FIRED. Full-fill projection 59.30%, 5.70 pp buffer; tightening here would gate legitimate diversifying admissions on the freed Day-6 capacity without addressing any active failure mode.
Tighten max_sector_pct (0.22 → 0.20): NOT FIRED. Largest sector BFSI 12.93%, 9.07 pp buffer. No cluster emerging.

Tighten min_confidence (0.65 → 0.68): NOT FIRED. Both today's entries cleared the 0.65 floor; closed-trade sample (n=8: 3W/5L) still too small for confidence-vs-outcome signal. The Day-6 EOD review explicitly held this lever for the same reason.
Tighten max_position_pct (0.15 → 0.12): NOT FIRED. NESTLEIND 12.06% largest, 2.94 pp buffer.

Tighten max_sl_pct (0.04 → 0.035): NOT FIRED. The 13:00 trigger ('3rd ceiling-hugging entry this session → fire') did not fire — no 3rd ceiling-hugging entry; no entries at all in the 13:00→13:30 window. Lever remains ARMED for the rest of the session under the same condition.
armed_triggers_for_next_tick: max_sl_pct 0.04 → 0.035 — fires if a 3rd entry today arrives with sl_pct ≥ 0.04 (the GLENMARK + BANDHANBNK boundary-hugging pattern repeating).
max_deployed_pct 0.65 → 0.60 — fires if full-fill projection climbs above 62% (currently 59.30%, 2.70 pp pre-fire buffer), to preserve a meaningful gap before the 65% binding cap.
max_sector_pct 0.22 → 0.20 — fires if any sector full-fill exposure exceeds 17% (largest currently BFSI 12.93%, 4.07 pp buffer).
daily_loss_limit_pct 0.04 → 0.03 — fires if daily realized P&L worsens past -₹15K (currently ₹0).
OPEN-order ageing watch — if GLENMARK remains OPEN at EOD without strategy cancelling/MODIFYing, log as a Day-1-style stale-order observation in the EOD review (not a risk_monitor lever).
rationale: Pure zero-delta tick. The 13:00 snapshot's healthy posture carries forward unchanged: deployment moderate, no concentration breaches, daily P&L flat, both today's entries cleared their gates. The override stack (min_confidence 0.65, max_position_pct 0.15, max_deployed_pct 0.65, max_sector_pct 0.22, default_sl_pct 0.015, min_sl_pct 0.01, max_sl_pct 0.04, daily_loss_limit_pct 0.04) is doing its work. With no new entries, no fills, and no P&L movement in the window, there is no firing trigger to act on — risk_monitor's discipline here is to NOT fire decoratively. Levers re-armed for the rest of the session as listed; no changelog entry written because no parameter was changed.
